    Serialized Form

    • Package evacuation.agent

      • Class evacuation.agent.Agent

        class Agent extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • agentsPassed
            int agentsPassed
          • arrivalBehavior
            Agent.ArrivalBehavior arrivalBehavior
          • autoPanicked
            boolean autoPanicked
          • behavior
            Agent.Behavior behavior
          • densityTolerance
            double densityTolerance
          • departureNode
            Node departureNode
          • destination
            Node destination
          • destinationMode
            Agent.DestinationMode destinationMode
          • displayX
            double displayX
          • displayY
            double displayY
          • edgeProgress
            double edgeProgress
          • graph
            Graph graph
          • id
            String id
          • initialBehavior
            Agent.Behavior initialBehavior
          • initialDestination
            Node initialDestination
          • initialPsychologicalState
            Agent.PsychologicalState initialPsychologicalState
          • markedForDeletion
            boolean markedForDeletion
          • movementState
            Agent.MovementState movementState
          • otherAgents
            List<Agent> otherAgents
          • path
            List<Node> path
          • pathFinder
            DijkstraPathFinder pathFinder
          • pathIndex
            int pathIndex
          • position
            Node position
          • psychologicalState
            Agent.PsychologicalState psychologicalState
          • speed
            int speed
          • startingPosition
            Node startingPosition
          • targetNode
            Node targetNode
          • waitingTicks
            int waitingTicks

    • Package evacuation.graph

      • Class evacuation.graph.DangerZone

        class DangerZone extends Node implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • burningNodes
            Set<Node> burningNodes
            Nodes currently on the burning/flooding front.
          • dangerType
            DangerZone.DangerType dangerType
          • nodesToBlock
            Set<Node> nodesToBlock
            Nodes that will be blocked in the next phase 1.
          • propagationTicks
            int propagationTicks
          • riskLevel
            int riskLevel
          • subPhase
            int subPhase
            0 = propagate to edges, 1 = block neighbor nodes.

      • Class evacuation.graph.Edge

        class Edge extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • agentsInTransit
            int agentsInTransit
          • agentsPassed
            int agentsPassed
            Total number of agents that have transited this edge.
          • available
            boolean available
          • blockType
            Edge.BlockType blockType
          • capacity
            int capacity
          • destination
            Node destination
          • directed
            boolean directed
            Whether this edge is directed (one-way: source→destination only).
          • source
            Node source
          • speedModifier
            double speedModifier
            Speed modifier: 1.0=normal, 2.0=fast, 0.5=slow. Affects Dijkstra cost.
          • weight
            double weight

      • Class evacuation.graph.Exit

        class Exit extends Node implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • capacity
            int capacity
            The evacuation capacity of this exit.
          • open
            boolean open
            Whether this exit is currently open.

      • Class evacuation.graph.Graph

        class Graph extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • edges
            List<Edge> edges
          • nodes
            List<Node> nodes

      • Class evacuation.graph.Node

        class Node extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • agentsPassed
            int agentsPassed
            Total number of agents that have passed through this node.
          • blocked
            boolean blocked
            Whether this node is blocked (impassable).
          • capacity
            int capacity
            Maximum number of agents that can occupy this node simultaneously.
          • id
            String id
            Unique identifier for this node.
          • x
            double x
            X coordinate in graph space.
          • y
            double y
            Y coordinate in graph space.

        serialVersionUID:
        1L

          • distances
            Map<String,Double> distances
          • graph

          • lastPath
